caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap sits at a table in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. Behind him, banners are visible, including one that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and another featuring the text "BOSSES TALK" and "S TALK". To his right, another individual is partially visible, wearing a blue garment. The studio is equipped with multiple microphones on stands and a laptop. In the background, clothing items are displayed on racks. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing with his right hand as he speaks. His head and body shift slightly as he talks, but the overall composition of the scene remains static. The lighting is consistent across the frames, highlighting the interior of what appears to be a recording or podcasting space.
